room.name: Sin - [RM] - Whip that sucker into shape
Sin - [RM] - am i getting lazy here?
Sin - [RM] - The Black Goats of Gehenna
We Strvn - [RM] - We need more Scabs
We Strvn - [RM] - Both Whipper and Snapper
We Strvn - [RM] - This is no good,,,
We Strvn - [RM] - It is kinda different
We Strvn - [RM] - All in or all out
We Strvn - [RM] - You mess with the wizard
We Strvn - [RM] - It has a bottom?
InfiniteCosmos - [RM] - Keeping in line with the classic "Beggar in a dangerous spot" seen in the alt path
InfiniteCosmos - [RM] - idk man if you want good room names come up with them yourself
InfiniteCosmos - [RM] - More like a demon summoner
InfiniteCosmos - [RM] - We'll protect you, Mr. President!
InfiniteCosmos - [RM] - This is some real cursed stuff
InfiniteCosmos - [RM] - Vis Versa here, back to blow away the competition
InfiniteCosmos - [RM] - This one's a freebie let's be honest
InfiniteCosmos - [RM] - Where do the demons come from anyway?
InfiniteCosmos - [RM] - A necromancer, a minotaur, and a portal walk into a bar...
InfiniteCosmos - [RM] - Look at him, he's all skin and bones
InfiniteCosmos - [RM] - The Ol' Ball without chain
InfiniteCosmos - [RM] - Cult of Blood and Bone
InfiniteCosmos - [RM] - You interrupted me in the middle of my surgery
InfiniteCosmos - [RM] - Get out of our room
InfiniteCosmos - [RM] - The pit is used for sacrifices
InfiniteCosmos - [RM] - The pit is also used for sacrifices
InfiniteCosmos - [RM] - Sorry, room's under construction, we still need to fill these pits with the dead skeletons
InfiniteCosmos - [RM] - What exactly is a group of necromancers called?
InfiniteCosmos - [RM] - The mere existence of brimfly reduces a rooms difficulty
InfiniteCosmos - [RM] - Guardians of the hyper flame
InfiniteCosmos - [RM] - The good old fashioned soul sucker room
InfiniteCosmos - [RM] - Why do they get to move and I don't?
InfiniteCosmos - [RM] - Why do they get to fire and I don't?
InfiniteCosmos - [RM] - You can do it the normal way or the fun way
InfiniteCosmos - [RM] - I hope you get a good pattern with these guys
InfiniteCosmos - [RM] - Which way are we going? You have no idea!
InfiniteCosmos - [RM] - Sorry, this side of the room is under construction
InfiniteCosmos - [RM] - What do these two sections even have in common?
